Metadata.title: BA5 Apartments — Premium Furnished Apartments in Oslo
Metadata.description: Experience Oslo from our handpicked, fully furnished apartments. Secure, comfortable, and homelike — perfect for short stays, business travel, and extended visits.
Metadata.keywords: furnished apartment oslo, short stay apartment oslo, oslo apartment rental, corporate housing oslo, luxury apartment oslo, self check-in apartment oslo, oslo accommodation, airbnb alternative oslo, holiday apartment oslo, serviced apartment oslo, oslo city center apartment, frogner apartment rental, majorstuen apartment oslo, short term rental oslo norway

Hero.subtitle: We offer handpicked, fully furnished apartments for those who value privacy, comfort, and proximity to the city.

About.label: About BA5 Apartments
About.heading: We redefine what it means to feel at home
About.text1: BA5 Apartments is part of BA5 Invest — a Norwegian real estate company that combines modern design with warm hospitality. Our handpicked apartments in Oslo's finest neighborhoods give you the space to relax, work, and live — with the comfort of a hotel and the warmth of home.
About.text2: Whether you're in Oslo for business, a short holiday, or an extended stay, we adapt to your needs. Every apartment is fully furnished and thoughtfully designed down to the smallest detail.

Features.subtitle: From secure check-in and professional cleaning to flexible stays and thoughtful interiors — everything is arranged so you feel at home.
Features.amenity1Desc: All stays are covered by insurance and secure check-in.
Features.amenity2Desc: Thorough cleaning between every stay — always fresh.
Features.amenity3Desc: Flexible arrival with smart lock and digital key.
Features.amenity5Desc: Short vacation, business trip, or longer periods.
Features.amenity6Desc: Tailored solutions for businesses in Oslo.

Stats.label: Numbers that speak for themselves
Stats.heading: From outstanding guest satisfaction to thoughtfully designed apartments and around-the-clock service.

ApartmentShowcase.heading: Stay your way
ApartmentShowcase.subtitle: Whether you seek tranquility, a central location, or a touch of luxury — BA5 has the perfect apartment for your stay.

MapSection.label: Our locations
MapSection.heading: Explore the neighborhoods
MapSection.subtitle: All our apartments are located in Oslo's most sought-after areas — click on the markers to explore.

FAQ.label: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.heading: Everything you need to know
FAQ.subtitle: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to contact us — we respond quickly and are always happy to help.
FAQ.a1: We use a smart lock with a digital code that you receive via SMS/email 24 hours before arrival. Check in whenever it suits you — no key handover needed. Detailed instructions are sent automatically.
FAQ.a2: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before check-in. Cancellations after this will be charged 50% of the total amount. We are flexible — contact us for special circumstances.
FAQ.a3: Absolutely! We have tailored solutions for businesses with fixed rates, invoicing, and priority availability. Contact us for a quote tailored to your needs.
FAQ.a4: All apartments are fully furnished with everything you need — from bedding and towels to kitchen utensils, WiFi, and laundry facilities. You just need to bring yourself.
FAQ.a5: Minimum stay is 1 night for most apartments. We also offer favorable rates for longer stays (weekly and monthly). Contact us for customized pricing.
FAQ.q6: How do you keep the apartments clean?
FAQ.a6: Professional cleaning between every stay, with a focus on hygiene and quality. Extra cleaning can be ordered during your stay. We follow strict cleaning protocols.
FAQ.a7: Some of our apartments are pet-friendly — contact us to find the right apartment for you and your four-legged friend. A small additional cleaning fee may apply.
FAQ.a8: Street parking is available in most neighborhoods. Some apartments also have access to private parking for an additional fee. We're happy to help find solutions.
